title: Super atmospheric ambient
description: CLIENT MODPACK | Super atmospheric ambient in game
body:
# SUPER ATMOSPHERIC AMBIENT
Get an unforgettable experience to play with this modpack

<iframe width="280" height="157" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/DgaofpECL3A" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
## Mods:

<details>
<summary>Sounds</summary>

**[AmbientSounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds) </br>**
[Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered) </br>
**[Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps) </br>**

</details>




<details>
<summary> Visual effects / Animation</summary>

[Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation) </br>
**[Explosive Enhancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/explosive-enhancement) </br>**
[Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves) </br>
[Motion Blur](https://modrinth.com/mod/motionblur) </br>
[Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) </br>
[Serious Player Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/serious-player-animations) </br>
[Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality) </br>
**[Wakes](https://modrinth.com/mod/wakes)** </br>

</details>

_*Not all mods are here_
